title: GoldenSun 3-In-1 Interactive Cat Toys for Indoor Cats Adult, Smart Cat Feather Toys, Rechargeable Power Cat Toys Balls & Handmade Butterfly Cat Toy, Teaser with 6 Attachments
features: 🎁[3-in-1 for more fun ] GoldenSun interactive cat toys seek to engage cats' natural instincts: chasing, pouncing, ambushing. Spinning balls stimulates your cat’s senses. Random popping feather stimulates hunting instincts. And rotating butterfly encourages to chase. All of these entertain your cats and burn their energy!

🔋[Built-in 2000mA Rechargeable Power] High-capacity electronic cat toy. Charge for 2 hours, work for a week! No purchase additional power necessary- Save money!!! 3in1 cat toy does not have to be attached to charger to run, so you can move it anywhere without concerns for wires.

😻[Safe Handmade Fabric Butterflies Amazon Debut] GoldenSun butterfly cat toy is made of fabric instead of plastic. With no sharp edges or hard piece of plastic to hurt cats' eye and nose. The butterfly has 2 modes - spin around constantly, and vibrate mode, where it would do short bursts of spinning, which really got the cats going.

🐾[Sturdy ABS Material] The whole toy is made of ABS material. The ball track is smooth and thick ensuring the safety of cats' paws. The toy surface is designed with no holes so cats' claws will not get stuck. Entertaining while keeping cats safe.

⏱️[Timer Function & Smart Mode] GoldenSun automatic cat toy activates 10/12-minutes each 3 hours and automatically enter standby mode. Cats can enjoy the toy while you're at work. Automatically turn off under dark envrionment in the 4th mode(Dark Light) to ensure your and cats' deep sleep.
😻 [Reliable 18-month Customers Service ] If there is any concerns, please tell us and we will give you a satisfied solution within 16 hours.

Interactive Cat Toy Merchant video The biggest advantage of GoldenSun 3 in 1 toys What are the reasons for choosing GoldenSun 3-1 toys——The GoldenSun 3-in-1 toy has several advantages that other toys cannot match. Previous page Next page 1 Large Capacity Power 2 Natural Feathers 3 Wrapped Wires 4 ABS Material 5 Accessories Built-in Light Sensor Witch Getting Along Better The wire is too straight and the butterfly spins fast. The length of the wire is designed to suit a wide range of cat sizes. The wire is 9.4 inches. please refer to the video for the specific effect. Please bend the wire to a curve before use. Butterfly can be spun more vividly. Is 3in1 cat toy safe for cats? GoldenSun butterfly cat toy was used safe handmade fabric butterflies instead of plastic. With no sharp edges or hard piece of plastic to hurt cats' eye and nose. It is recommended to trim the cat's sharp nails before playing. How do you know when the 3in1 electronic cat toy is low power / fully charged? The cat toy will flash red light when running low power. Use the supplied USB cable to charge the toy for 2 hours until the green light is on. It is fully charged. I would like this automatic cat toy to stop running at night and not disturb our sleep. Please select the 4th mode (light off mode). In this mode, the toy will identity the dark enviroment and automatically turn off. If the multi-functional interactive cat toy stop working, how can I get the SUPPORT? Hi, Please go to Your Orders and Find your order in the list, then Select Problem with order, Choose your topic from list displayed, Select Contact-sell-er.
